body:
This PR changes two of the literated examples in the docs to use Makie for plotting.

- [x] `two_dimensional_turbulence.jl`
- [x] `internal_wave.jl` 

Also: 
- delete the `geostrophic_adjustment.jl` example since it's not being literated any more
- use `FieldTimeSeries` in `baroclinic_adjustment.jl` example
title: Convert `two_dimensional_turbulence.jl` and `internal_wave.jl` literated examples in docs to use CairoMakie
